violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils ice machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was unplugged and put out of service at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to use ice machine until it is properly cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025

Deli meat was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025
Both 2 door reach-in gaskets were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. Establishment is to obtain thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. On the both two door coolers in the kitchen. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2024
Floor Tiles were observed damaged in the kitchen area. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2025
